data.name: AutoBanBlacklist
AutoBanFromBlacklist
PrivateChatBanAttempt
BanChannel
data.value: Message deleted, channel {0} banned in chat {1}

data.name: RemovedFromApproved
data.value: ⚠️ User {0} removed from approved list after auto-ban from blacklist

data.name: ChannelMessage
data.value: Message from channel {0} in chat {1} - report to admin chat

data.name: SuspiciousUser
AiProfileAnalysis
SuspiciousMessage
data.value: ⚠️ *Suspicious message* - requires manual review. Message *NOT deleted*. User [{0}](tg://user?id={1}) in chat *{2}* Message: `{3}`

data.name: ChannelError
data.value: ⚠️ Cannot ban channel in chat {0}. Not enough permissions?

data.name: UserCleanup
data.value: 🧹 User {0} cleaned from all lists after auto-ban

data.name: AiDetectAutoDelete
data.value:
🔍🤖🚫 *Special AI detect: auto-delete spam*
👤 User: [{0}](tg://user?id={1}) 🏠 Chat: *{2}* 📨 Message: `{3}` 🎭 Mimicry score: *{4:F2}* 🤖 AI analysis: *{5:F2}* - {6} 🔬 ML score: *{7:F2}* ⚡ Action: **Automatically deleted + 2 hour restriction**

data.name: AiDetectSuspicious
data.value:
🔍🤖❓ *Special AI detect: suspicious message*
👤 User: [{0}](tg://user?id={1}) 🏠 Chat: *{2}* 📨 Message: `{3}` 🎭 Mimicry score: *{4:F2}* 🤖 AI analysis: *{5:F2}* - {6} 🔬 ML score: *{7:F2}* 🔒 User restricted for 2 hours. Decision required.

data.name: UserRemovedFromApproved
data.value: ⚠️ User [{0}](tg://user?id={1}) removed from approved list after receiving restrictions in chat *{2}*

data.name: UserRestricted
data.value: 🔔 In chat *{0}* user [{1}](tg://user?id={2}) was given read-only or banned, check Recent actions, ML might have missed spam. If so - send here.{3}
